zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert De Fouleshurst於1420年出生在英國英格蘭爾可維時，他的父親Thomas de Fouleshurst II23歲，母親Cecily Mainwaring19歲。他於1452年與Joan de Whitmore在英國英格蘭爾法爾登結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年12月3日在英國英格蘭爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert De Fouleshurst于1420年出生在英国英格兰爾可維时，他的父亲Thomas de Fouleshurst II23岁，母亲Cecily Mainwaring19岁。他于1452年与Joan de Whitmore在英国英格兰爾法爾登结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年12月3日在英国英格兰爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert De Fouleshurst was born in 1420, in Crewe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Fouleshurst II, was 23 and his mother, Cecily Mainwaring, was 19. He married Joan de Whitmore in 1452, in Farndon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 3 December 1498, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert De Fouleshurst est né en 1420, à Crewe, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Fouleshurst II, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Cecily Mainwaring, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Whitmore en 1452, à Farndon, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1498, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert De Fouleshurst 1420 in Crewe, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Fouleshurst II 23 und seine Mutter Cecily Mainwaring 19. Er hat 1452 in Farndon, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Whitmore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1498 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Fouleshurst è nato il nel 1420 nel Crewe, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas de Fouleshurst II, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Mainwaring, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Whitmore nel 1452, nel Farndon, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 dicembre 1498, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Fouleshurstが1420年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアクレウで生まれた時，父Thomas de Fouleshurst IIは23歳，母Cecily Mainwaringは19歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアファルンドンでJoan de Whitmoreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1498年12月3日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Fouleshurst(이)가 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 크레베에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Fouleshurst II(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Mainwaring(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 패른던에서 Joan de Whitmore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 12월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert De Fouleshurst nasceu em 1420, em Crewe, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Fouleshurst II, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Mainwaring, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Whitmore em 1452, em Farndon, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1498, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert De Fouleshurst родился в 1420 г. в местности крю, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Fouleshurst II было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Cecily Mainwaring, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Whitmore в 1452 г. в местности фарндон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 декабря 1498 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert De Fouleshurst nació en 1420, en Crewe, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Fouleshurst II, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Cecily Mainwaring, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joan de Whitmore en 1452, en Farndon, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1498, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años.
